title: Customer Memory Reference
description: AI v1 reference to privacy-safe customer memory used only as contextual input, not as a source of truth for order, payment, or price.
$comment: Sources: PACK-05 and TECH-05 customer memory boundary. TODO: source documents do not define full memory consent/status taxonomy.

memory_scope.description: Scope of memory permitted for AI context. TODO: define official scope values.

consent_status.description: Consent or privacy status. TODO: define official privacy status enum.

allowed_for_response.description: Whether this memory can be used for the current response.

redaction_required.description: Whether memory requires redaction before response.
